title: Runtime/ABI updates, doc command, and corelib test sweep

source.subject: compiler: runtime/ABI updates, doc command, corelib submodule bump, tests

body:
## Outcome

Runtime/ABI updates, doc command, corelib submodule bump, tests.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Fibers, channels, and GC runtime** (`v02-concurrency-runtime`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
- **Commit:** [`0ded628`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/0ded628) — compiler: runtime/ABI updates, doc command, corelib submodule bump, tests
